Package com.here.sdk.prefetcher

package com.here.sdk.prefetcher
  • Class
    Description
    MapDataSize
    Represents map data size.
    MapDataSizeListener
    Interface to get the result of map data size estimation.
    PolygonPrefetcher
    Supports downloading of map data - in advance - into the cache to optimize temporary offline use cases that rely on cached map data.
    PrefetchStatusListener
    Interface to get notified on status updates when prefetching map data.
    RoutePrefetcher
    Supports downloading of map data - in advance - into the cache to optimize temporary offline use cases that rely on cached map data.
